headline: FDA Clears First Autonomous AI Diagnostic for Emergency Triage
body: The FDA granted 510(k) clearance to Viz.ai's autonomous triage system for emergency departments, marking the first time an AI tool has been authorized to independently prioritize patients without physician oversight in the initial screening step. The system analyzes vital signs, chief complaints, and imaging data to assign ESI acuity levels within 90 seconds of patient registration. Clinical trials across 12 Level I trauma centers showed the AI matched or exceeded physician triage accuracy 94% of the time, with a 31% reduction in door-to-provider time for critical cases. Emergency medicine groups are divided on the implications, but health system CFOs see a clear path to ED throughput gains.
